title: ToR Consultancy to Produce Creative TV and Radio Spots to Elevate the Status of Teaching Profession in Tanzania.
description: The selected agency/individual will be responsible for producing creative TV and Radio spots to be aired across major channels in Tanzania.

documents.note: Google Drive link - manual download required

eligibility: Submit a single ZIP file to consultancy@tenmet.or.tz and copy procurement@tenmet.or.tz
